rulings.Case Title: MARIE R. TORANGO VS. PETER TING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defs Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT PETER TING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defs Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Under California Code of Civil Procedure section 437 subdivision (c) paragraph (c), Plaintiffs demonstrate that there is a triable issue of material fact remaining, including for claims one, two, three, and four. (See, e.g., Exhibit 19.) =(501/REQ)
